# Fixture for SE-086 ubiquitous-language tests

The Sprint planning meeting reviewed the Backlog. Sprint velocity dropped.
PBI estimation is improving. The Sprint demo will showcase Backlog refinement.
Skill Maturity is a key concept. The Skill Maturity kanban tracks Skill items.
Era 19 introduces Knowledge Graph. The Knowledge Graph indexes entities.
SDD specs reference SDD slices. The PBI workflow uses PBI templates.
Sprint planning, Sprint review, Sprint retro are ceremonies.
